title: [BUG]  breaks the selectbox after writing the file.
author: VerilogR
body:
## 💬 Questions and Help
Hello everybody. we use the file to write data to it using exceljs, but after the data is written, the selectbox does not work. please help
![Screenshot_2](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/6389207/81666366-a0884f80-944a-11ea-8fbc-e41f0c7e218a.png)

comments.author: Alanscut
comments.body: Do you mind providing a complete example? And tell you the version you are using.
